endpoints.summary: Your Developer account must be enabled and contain units. Additional OfficialRecords Information ... api/OfficialRecords?parameter1={parameter1}&parameter2={parameter2}&authKey={authKey}
endpoints.description: Your Developer account must be enabled and contain units.

uri_parameters.name: parameter1
uri_parameters.description: Alpha Numeric [MAX 25 DIGITS] - [MIN 1 DIGIT] If using CFN parameter1 = CFN YEAR in 4 digit year format Example: 1985 If using BOOK and PAGE parameter1 = BOOK in 4 digit format Example: 2005 If using FOLIO NUMBER parameter1 = FOLIO_NUMBER in 25 or less digit format Example: 1234567891011

uri_parameters.name: parameter2
uri_parameters.description: String If using CFN parameter2 = Letter "R" + CFN SQN Example: R123456789 If using BOOK and PAGE parameter2 = PAGE Example: 22471 If using FOLIO NUMBER parameter2 must be = "FN" Example: FN
